description: Letter from the muqaddam of Malij, congratulating R. Aharon ha-Qarawi (or: "who is called") Abu l-Ḥasan on God's miracles and Aharon's deliverance from wicked people. Contains at least 10 lines of wishes for the recovery of Aharon's son Yefet from his illness, citing numerous biblical verses. In the address on verso, al-Rayyis Rabbenu Avraham is mentioned. "Magnificent script and Hebrew style of 29 lines, then in (Judaeo-)Arabic 8 lines." Information from Goitein's note cards.
tags: Illness, illness: public figure, illness: recovered, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
